title: Syal's delight
description: Added potato chips to Farmer's Delight!
body:
# Syal's delight  
### Name Origin  
The Chinese meaning of “Delight” is semantically similar to the Chinese translation of the well-known American potato chip brand Lay’s. As a result, the phrase “Why isn’t there Delight Delight?” gradually emerged within Chinese internet communities as a form of lighthearted joke.

### Development Motivation  
In addition to the long-standing community discussion of “Why isn’t there Delight Delight?”, this project was also inspired by the following two factors:  
- The [Farmer’s Delight](https://modrinth.com/mod/farmers-delight) series lacks potato chip-related content, leaving room for complementary additions;  
- During the development of the core modpack, [GregTech Food Option](https://modrinth.com/mod/gregtech-food-option) introduced Syals potato chips, which sparked further interest in the item design of that mod.

### Texture Copyright  
Some textures used in this project have also been utilized in other projects. All texture copyrights belong to the original author TXSC, who retains full rights to all textures. No one may use any textures without explicit authorization.  
Author page: [TXSC](https://www.mcmod.cn/author/37663.html)
